name: Scheduling Appointments Based on Incoming Emails
description: Polls Gmail for new emails. For each email, OpenAI extracts the patient name, doctor type, and requested date-time period. Free time slots are fetched from Google Calendar for that period, the workflow loops over them keeping only slots at least 45 minutes long, and OpenAI proposes a list of concrete 45-minute appointment options. The workflow replies to the original email with the suggestions.
shortDescription: Turn appointment-request emails into concrete bookable time slots with AI.
keyFeatures: AI extraction of appointment details into structured JSON
Google Calendar free-slot lookup for the requested period
AI appointment suggestion in a fixed text format
Automatic reply to the original email
prerequisites: Google Calendar connection with the target calendar
idealFor: Clinics or service businesses that want to turn appointment-request emails into concrete bookable time slots automatically.
steps: Trigger: poll Gmail for new emails.
Fetch the email from the trigger.
Extract the patient name, doctor type, and requested date-time period with OpenAI.
Get free time slots from Google Calendar for that period.
Loop over the slots, keeping only those at least 45 minutes long.
Read back the list of valid slots.
Propose a list of 45-minute appointment options with OpenAI.
Reply to the original email with the suggested appointments.
